title: Tusk Strategies

title: Services - Tusk Strategies
description: We run interdisciplinary, mission-based projects for our clients. For every engagement, we use every tool at our disposal to create the political conditions that will lead to the most favorable outcome.

title: Our Team - Tusk Strategies
description: We’ve built a culture of innovation by enlisting a world-class team. We’re hardworking, proactive, and pride ourselves on being nimble and responsive so we’re ready to tackle any challenge our clients face.

title: Crypto + Advanced Tech Practice - Tusk Strategies
content: Crypto + Advanced Tech Practice Tusk partners with industry visionaries to break through regulatory barriers, amplify their message, and scale operations in the U.S. and across the globe. Global Reach, Local Expertise We create and execute campaigns to help our clients launch in new global markets, overcome political opposition, and obtain regulatory approvals from New York State to Washington, D.C. We work with policymakers across party lines, leveraging our network, experience, and policy expertise to deliver outstanding results. Our work in New York speaks for itself. So far in 2025, Tusk has represented every entity that’s received a BitLicense or Limited Purpose Trust Charter from NY DFS. We’ve also represented the vast majority of other successful applicants in recent years, including Fireblocks, eToro, ZeroHash, and Apex Crypto, among others. Interested in how we can help? Send a note to the Head of Crypto + Advanced Tech, Partner Eric Soufer.
headings: Tusk partners with industry visionaries to break through regulatory barriers, amplify their message, and scale operations in the U.S. and across the globe.

title: New York Practice - Tusk Strategies
content: New York Practice After managing Michael Bloomberg’s successful mayoral reelection campaign, Bradley founded Tusk Strategies in 2010. New York City and State campaigns remain the cornerstone of our work. Over the 16 years, we’ve taken on and won some of the toughest fights in New York politics, from securing Uber’s entry to the NYC market to passing first-of-its-kind AI legislation in the NYC council and winning two major expansions of the Empire State Film & TV Tax Credit despite significant opposition. Our Team Our team is led by seasoned operatives with deep roots in New York politics and policy. Shontell Smith, head of the New York Practice, served as Chief of Staff and Counsel for the New York State Senate Majority Conference and brings unmatched insight into the inner workings of the Legislature and Executive Chamber. Our New York leadership includes Chris Coffey, Tusk’s CEO, whose two decades of work in City Hall, on major campaigns, and in crisis communications make him one of the most sought-after public affairs strategists in the state. Interested in how we can help? Send a note to the head of our NY Practice, Partner Shontell Smith. Our Wins City Securing Uber’s groundbreaking entry into the NYC market that served as a national campaign template Gaining approval for The Met’s new modern art wing from five Community Boards and the Landmarks Preservation Commission Passing first-in-nation AI legislation in NYC that brought regulatory certainty to AI in hiring Creating a safer and more pedestrian friendly Times Square Achieving the first legislative victory in decades to limit carriage horses in Central Park Expanding charter schools and pushing back against changes to the SHSAT exam State Amending state rules and securing city approvals for the Metropolitan Park casino project in Willets Point, Queens Expanding and improving the Empire State Film and Television Tax Credit in 2023 and again in 2025 Revising insurance laws to create sustained market access fo
